name: dynamico
description: Runtime React renderer that loads components from a directory and updates them live, on web and Expo.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @omriashke/dynamico-core test && pnpm --filter @omriashke/dynamico-registry test && pnpm --filter @omriashke/dynamico-book test && pnpm --filter @omriashke/dynamico-validator test
